testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_93] Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)

[NONE][CKV_AWS_59] Ensure there is no open access to back-end resources through API
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_70] Ensure API gateway method has authorization or API key set

[NONE][CKV_AWS_259] Ensure CloudFront response header policy enforces Strict Transport Security
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_62] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_286] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
[NONE][CKV_AWS_288] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration
[NONE][CKV_AWS_290] Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints

[NONE][CKV_AWS_355] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

failure.message: Ensure AWS Lambda function is configured to validate code-signing

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lambda_function.viajes File: /lambda-viajes.tf: 51-76 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-272
51 | resource "aws_lambda_function" "viajes" { 52 | function_name = "viajes" 53 | handler = "index.handler" 54 | runtime = "nodejs16.x" 55 | role = aws_iam_role.lambda_viajes_exec_role.arn // El arn es el ID para conectar el rol con el recurso 56 | filename = data.archive_file.lambda_viajes.output_path 57 | source_code_hash = data.archive_file.lambda_viajes.output_base64sha512 58 | 59 | environment { 60 | variables = { 61 | DB_HOST = "db-taxis-viajes-usuarios.cbmia0266pjz.us-east-2.rds.amazonaws.com" //endpoint 62 | DB_USER = "IACgrupo7" //master username 63 | DB_PASSWORD = "grupo7_rds" //password 64 | DB_NAME = "db-taxis-viajes-usuarios" 65 | } 66 | } 67 | 68 | vpc_config { 69 | subnet_ids = [ 70 | data.aws_subnet.public1-us-east-2a.id, //Definir a que subnet ira la lambda 71 | data.aws_subnet.public2-us-east-2b.id 72 | ] 73 | security_group_ids = [data.aws_security_group.lambda_sg.id] //Definir el security group 74 | } 75 | 76 | }
